data_label: Demo Data — Not Actual Client Information

examples.expected_response: Breakfast is served daily from 7:00 AM to 10:30 AM at Sati Kitchen.

examples.expected_response_pattern: I don’t have confirmed information about babysitting, so I don’t want to give you the wrong answer. I can ask Guest Relations to confirm.

examples.input: Can I check out at 5 PM?
examples.expected_response_pattern: Late check-out is subject to availability. I can send a request to Front Office for 5:00 PM. The team must confirm before it is final.

examples.input: I have high blood pressure. Is detox safe?
examples.expected_response_pattern: Thank you for telling me. I can’t safely advise whether this program is suitable for your condition. I’ll pass this to our Wellness Team so they can speak with you directly before anything is confirmed.
